category_title: Students with limited English proficiency who communicate knowledge through visual arts
minimal_context: The student is using library books and internet sites to decide on a research topic and develop inquiry questions.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's start by deciding on an interesting research topic and developing your inquiry questions using these library books and internet sites.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't know what topic to pick. It is hard to collect information from all these pages.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I can't think of any inquiry questions to write down.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think you should do next?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Anxiously) Can I please just start on my summative earlier? I want to work on the shape of my project instead of doing this.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's start by deciding on an interesting research topic and developing your inquiry questions using these library books and internet sites.

STUDENT: I don't know what topic to pick. It is hard to collect information from all these pages.

TUTOR: Keep looking through the resources.

STUDENT: I can't think of any inquiry questions to write down.

TUTOR: What do you think you should do next?

STUDENT: (Anxiously) Can I please just start on my summative earlier? I want to work on the shape of my project instead of doing this.
